# Contact Sift

Sift customers, visit your global community of fraud fighting professionals to view product documentation, ask questions or submit a support ticket.

## Leading Brands Rely on Sift

Our deep investments in machine learning and user identity, a data network scoring 1 trillion events per year, and a commitment to long-term customer success empower more than 700 customers to grow.
